title: Beehiiv vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Moosend: pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
h1: Beehiiv vs Moosend: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Both Beehiiv and Moosend are freemium email marketing platforms with strong ratings, but they serve different audiences. Beehiiv targets newsletter publishers seeking monetization features, while Moosend focuses on small businesses wanting affordable automation. This comparison will help you decide which platform aligns with your specific goals.
choose_a_if: You run a newsletter and want to monetize it through ads or sponsorships
You need advanced segmentation and a web reader for your audience
You're willing to pay more for premium newsletter-specific features
choose_b_if: You want the lowest entry price with powerful automation at $9/month
You need landing pages and subscription forms built-in
You prioritize unlimited email sending over advanced monetization features

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers with monetization needs, while Moosend is better for small businesses seeking affordable automation. Both have identical G2 and Trustpilot ratings (4.7 and 4.4), so the choice comes down to your specific features and budget requirements.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at just $9/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. However, Beehiiv offers a higher free tier with 2,500 subscribers versus Moosend's 1,000. For budget-conscious users, Moosend provides exceptional value for automation features.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your contacts and subscriber lists between platforms using standard email export/import features. Most email marketing tools support CSV exports, making the transition relatively straightforward. However, you may need to manually reconfigure automations and designs in your new platform.
